creator: oleg@pcbtech.ru
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #24)

it seems to me, that the following happens as a result of this commit. See what's happen when i try to build ports (using just make or, as usually, by portsnap + portmaster):

[office] /usr/ports/textproc/expat2 $ make clean
===>  Cleaning for expat-2.1.1
[office] /usr/ports/textproc/expat2 $ make
/usr/ports/Mk/Scripts/check-vulnerable.sh: dp_PKGNAME: parameter not set
*** Error code 2

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/textproc/expat2
